healthReason: Blocker B1 (PR #1303 merge conflict) persists for 2nd consecutive EM cycle — escalation rule triggered.
summary: Sprint PR #1303 (closes #955/#957) remains CONFLICTING for the 2nd cycle. Root cause is the Go module rename in #1315 (agent-guard → agentguard) which landed on main after the branch was cut. CI cannot run until senior coder rebases. Architecture was PASS-reviewed by workspace-pr-review-agent. Escalating to director per rule: blocker persists 2+ cycles. Separately: two duplicate PRs (#1328, #1330) both fix CLI publish E403 — human must pick one. Stale EM report PR #1324 flagged for closure. PR budget: 1 active / 3 max. 4129 tests passing (no regressions).
